nodes.name: 红颈绿鸠
nodes.summary: 红颈绿鸠（Pink-necked green pigeon，学名 Treron vernans），分类上属于鸽形目，并归入鸠鸽科，在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于原始森林、次生林，主要威胁包括猎捕压力。

nodes.name: 鸠鸽科
nodes.summary: 鸠鸽科（Columbidae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联299种鸟类，如Purple-winged ground dove、Moreno's ground dove、Black-winged ground dove等299种鸟类。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联1443种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等1443种鸟类。

nodes.name: 猎捕压力
nodes.summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。

nodes.name: 次生林
nodes.summary: 次生林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联78种鸟类，包括孤䳍、Sickle-winged guan、黑額鳴冠雉等78种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 鸽形目
nodes.summary: 鸽形目（Columbiformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联299种鸟类，如Purple-winged ground dove、Moreno's ground dove、Black-winged ground dove等299种鸟类。

nodes.name: 原始森林
nodes.summary: 原始森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联31种鸟类，包括黑額鳴冠雉、Singing quail、Stripe-faced wood quail等31种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It occupies a variety of habitats, including primary forest, forest edge, secondary forest, and coastal mangroves. It favours more open environments and where it is found in association with denser forest it is typically on the edges. It is also readily found in human dominated environments such as gardens, plantations and farmland

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It occupies a variety of habitats, including primary forest, forest edge, secondary forest, and coastal mangroves. It favours more open environments and where it is found in association with denser forest it is typically on the edges. It is also readily found in human dominated environments such as gardens, plantations and farmland

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: |journal=Raffles Bulletin of Zoology |date=2012 |volume=Supplement 25 |pages=89–196 |url=https://www.researchgate.net/publication/256094237}} In spite of suffering some hunting pressure in Thailand, Malaysia and Sumatra, and being targeted by the cage bird trade, it remains common there and across most of its range. Because it is not considered to be in any danger of extinction it has been evaluated as least concern by the IUCN Red List of Threatened Species
